name: Butternut Squash
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Butternut squash, peeled and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the miso in the orange juice and set aside.
2. Cook the butternut squash in water until it just loosens its firmness, then drain.
3. In a large skillet, sauté the carrots and onions in broth until the onions are translucent and the carrots are crisp-tender.
4. Add the squash and orange juice mixture to the carrots and onions.
5. Continue cooking until the squash reaches the desired texture and the moisture has evaporated.
